name: Router + Task Classification
description: Build the intelligence layer that makes Tide more than a passthrough. Classify tasks before sending to Pi, select appropriate models, introduce planning phase for complex tasks, and track costs.
notes: Router lives as a Pi extension (tide-router.ts) using before_agent_start hook.
Planner lives as a Pi extension (tide-planner.ts) for generating feature plans.
Orchestration state management will live in Rust (Phase 8).
Cost tracking uses token counts from Pi state events.
Phase 6 (Pi wiring) must be complete — router needs model switching to work.

tasks.title: Create tide-router.ts Pi extension
tasks.description: Pi extension that intercepts before_agent_start hook. Analyzes user prompt using heuristics: keyword matching (refactor, architect, redesign → complex), length, question marks, file count references. Classifies as quick/standard/complex. Sets model: quick → fast model (haiku/flash), standard → balanced (sonnet), complex → powerful (opus). Emits routing_decision event to UI.

tasks.title: Build Router Status UI
tasks.description: Status bar component showing current routing decision: task classification badge (quick/standard/complex), active model name, and a manual override dropdown. Reads routing_decision events from Pi event stream via routerStore.ts.

tasks.title: Create Feature Plan Generator (tide-planner.ts)
tasks.description: Pi extension for complex tasks. When router classifies a task as complex, the orchestrator triggers a planning phase: a separate Pi prompt with a planning system prompt that outputs a structured JSON plan to .tide/features/<slug>.json. Plan format: { slug, title, description, steps: [{ id, description, status, files, acceptanceCriteria }], createdAt }.

tasks.title: Build Plan Viewer Panel
tasks.description: New tab in AgentPanel (Chat / Logs / Plan). Reads .tide/features/ via Rust FS commands. Shows active plan steps as a checklist with status indicators (pending/in-progress/done). Clicking a step shows its description and target files. Steps update status as the builder executes them.

tasks.title: Build Cost Tracker
tasks.description: Track token usage per prompt (input + output tokens). Display cumulative cost estimate in status bar based on model pricing tables. costStore.ts accumulates per-prompt costs. CostIndicator.tsx shows session total. Pricing: Opus ~$15/$75, Sonnet ~$3/$15, Haiku ~$0.25/$1.25 per million tokens.
